Operation_Outputs.description:
A map of expressions that represent outputs returned from this operation. Each map item
        consists of a name with a content map that provides the value expression, and possibly a
        map of child outputs consisting of name / value expressions. Names may only contain
        letters, numbers, spaces, underscores, and hyphens, and cannot start with spaces.

info.description:
## Kinetic Integrator API

  Integrator is the component of the Kinetic Platform that allows forms and workflows to interact with
  external systems. `Connections` define the location and authentication mechanism of the external system,
  and `Operations` define the individual endpoints that will be requested.

  The underlying details of what type of information a Connection or Operation requires will depend on the
  type of integration being used. For instance, `HTTP` type integrations will have different connection
  and operation parameters than a `Postgres` or `LDAP` type integration.

  Currently the following types of integrations are provided:

  - HTTP
  - Microsoft SQL Server
  - Postgres

  More types are planned and will be coming.

  ## API Authentication

  Some of the Integrator API enpoints are unprotected, such as /healthz and /version. But most of the endpoints
  require authentication through a bearer token, or JSON Web Token (JWT).

  ## Response Format

  All responses will be returned using the JSON format, with the response `Content-Type` header being set to `application/json`.
info.title: Kinetic Integrator REST API
